languages.text: "Оставьте, Себериан, я не нуждаюсь в одобрении и сделал{mf||а} это не ради вас. Я просто хотел{mf||а} выбраться оттуда".

traits.locale_text: [draft] говорим, что нам не нужно его одобрение, мы просто хотели выбраться из чертовой ловушки

languages.text: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."
languages.original_text: "Оставьте, Себериан, я не нуждаюсь в одобрении и сделал{mf||а} это не ради вас. Я просто хотел{mf||а} выбраться оттуда".

traits.locale_text: "Leave it, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."
"Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."
"Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."
"Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

languages.text: «Déjelo estar, Seberian. Ni necesito su aprobación ni he hecho esto por usted. Sencillamente, quería salir de ese lugar».
languages.original_text: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: «Déjelo estar, Seberian. Ni necesito su aprobación ni he hecho esto por usted. Sencillamente, quería salir de ese lugar».

languages.text: “算了吧，塞贝里安。我不需要你的认可，我做这些也不是为了你。我只是想逃离那个地方。”
languages.original_text: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: “算了吧，塞贝里安。我不需要你的认可，我做这些也不是为了你。我只是想逃离那个地方。”

languages.text: « Plus un mot, Seberian. Je me passe allègrement de votre approbation, et ce n'est pas pour vous que je l'ai fait. Je souhaitais simplement échapper à cet endroit. »
languages.original_text: "Leave it, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: « Plus un mot, Seberian. Je me passe allègrement de votre approbation, et ce n'est pas pour vous que je l'ai fait. Je souhaitais simplement échapper à cet endroit. »

languages.text: "Bırak bu işleri Seberian. Senin onayına ihtiyacım yok, bunu hatırın için de yapmadım. Sadece oradan kaçmak istedim."
languages.original_text: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: "Bırak bu işleri Seberian. Senin onayına ihtiyacım yok, bunu hatırın için de yapmadım. Sadece oradan kaçmak istedim."

languages.text: 「黙ってろ、シベリア。君の承認は必要ない。このことを君のためにしたわけでもない。ただ、あの場所から逃れたいと思っただけだ。」
languages.original_text: "Leave it be, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: 「黙ってろ、シベリア。君の承認は必要ない。このことを君のためにしたわけでもない。ただ、あの場所から逃れたいと思っただけだ。」

languages.text: "Hört auf, Seberian. Ich brauche weder Eure Anerkennung, noch habe ich es für Euch getan. Ich wollte einfach nur weg von diesem Ort."
languages.original_text: "Leave it, Seberian. I have no need of your approval, nor did I do this for your sake. I simply wished to escape that place."

traits.locale_text: "Hört auf, Seberian. Ich brauche weder Eure Anerkennung, noch habe ich es für Euch getan. Ich wollte einfach nur weg von diesem Ort."
